_doc: Source of truth for sport season windows + NFL pre-launch state.
Served by /api/public/launch-config. Read by both the iOS/Android
in-app screens (PicksTab state selector + sport chip row) and the
sharppicks.ai landing 'Today at the desk' grid.
To flip NFL live: set sports.nfl.launched to true and bump version.
No app rebuild required; clients re-fetch on launch + every 1 hour.
same flag and stops serving NFL rows via ?sport=nfl until launched.
Date fields are ISO-8601. Display strings derived client-side from
the device's local date so the date pill matches the user's clock.
Entries flagged `tbd: true` are best-guess placeholders pending an
official league announcement; update when the league publishes.

nba.season_end_note: Knicks 4-1 over Spurs. Game 5 in San Antonio.

opening_night.tbd_note: Official NBA 2026-27 schedule release pending (typically late summer).

road_back.title: NBA Draft
road_back.note: Roster priors start moving. The model reads depth charts, not green rooms.

road_back.title: Free agency opens
road_back.note: Player movement reprices every team prior. The noisiest stretch of the calendar.

road_back.title: Summer League
road_back.note: Exhibition data never enters the model. Nothing here is tradeable.

road_back.title: Training camps
road_back.note: Rotations take shape. Minutes projections come back online.

road_back.title: Preseason
road_back.note: The retrained model is checked against its error bands before a single signal ships.

road_back.title: Opening night
road_back.note: First signals pending threshold. No edge, no pick. Same rules as last year.

nfl.kickoff_note: Wed Sep 9, 2026. Seahawks (Super Bowl champion) host Patriots.
nfl._journal_article_slug_doc: Set to the slug of 'What an NFL Model Has to Prove' when published. While null, MODEL NOTES card links to /blog/.

gates.title: Historical backtest
gates.note: Seven seasons. Every game graded against the closing line, walk-forward, no peeking.

gates.title: Edge threshold locked
gates.note: The model only signals where the backtest proved an edge. Everything outside it is a pass.

gates.title: Live-line dry run
gates.note: The model runs against real markets all summer. Picks are tracked internally, none are issued.

gates.title: Calibration gate
gates.note: Error bands checked one final time before week one. If it misses, launch waits.

road_to_week_one.title: Training camps open
road_to_week_one.note: Rosters and rotations start to settle. The model watches the depth charts, not the drills.

road_to_week_one.title: Preseason
road_to_week_one.note: Exhibition data never enters the model, and no preseason picks will be issued. Same rule as every sport here.

road_to_week_one.title: Final roster cuts
road_to_week_one.note: Fifty-three man rosters lock. Team priors are set for the final calibration pass.
